name: TypeScript Strict Mode
description: Upgrade a TypeScript project to strict mode: enable strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, and fix every resulting type error. Leaves the codebase bulletproof.

steps.description: Count total type errors introduced by strict mode
Fix null/undefined type errors: add proper null checks and optional chaining
Fix implicit any: add explicit type annotations to function parameters
Fix missing return type annotations on exported functions
Verify zero type errors with strict mode enabled
Confirm all tests still pass after type fixes

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Enable strictest TypeScript settings and fix every resulting error
